rulings.Case Title: DIANE SCHOBER et al VS. KAMRAN ARDEBILCHI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Appointment Of Special Master Discovery Referee C.C.P. Section 639(A)(5
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for, Friday, April 3, 2015, line 1, DEFENDANT KAMRAN ARDEBILCHI, JAHANGIR ARDEBILCHI, PRIME PACIFIC INVESTMENTS, INC.'s Motion for Appointment of Special Master Discovery Referee per CCP 639(A)(5) is OFF CALENDAR. On March 10, 2015, this matter was granted complex designation and singly assigned to Judge Curtis Karnow for all purposes. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ESCALADE CAPITAL GROUP, LLC VS. OLD REPUBLIC TITLE COMPANY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Relief From Default And Notice Of Hearing
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for, Friday, April 3, 2015, line 2. Cross-Defendant's Motion for Relief from Default is GRANTED. Relief from default is mandatory if the application is accompanied by an attorney affidavit attesting to his mistake, inadvertence, surprise, or neglect unless the court finds that the default was not in fact caused by those actions. (CCP § 473(b).) Counsel's affidavit sufficiently attested to the mistake, inadvertence, or neglect. The Court imposes sanctions on Cross-Defendant's counsel, Steve Whitworth, Esq., in the amount of $800 and awards reasonable attorneys' fees and costs for opposing this motion to Cross-Complainant. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARY-KATHERINE FITZGERALD et al VS. PAUL TERRELL, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS TRUSTEE OF THE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion & Motion For Leave To File Compulsory Cross-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for, Friday, April 3, 2015, line 4. Defendants' Motion for Leave to File Cross-Complaint is GRANTED subject to obtaining a continuance. To be considered a compulsory cross-complaint, a related cause of action must have existed at the time of the service of defendant's answer. (Code Civ. Proc., Section 426.30.) "Related cause of action" means a cause of action which arises out of the same transaction, occurrence, or series of transactions or occurrences as the cause of action which the plaintiff alleges in his complaint. (Code Civ. Proc., Section 426.10(c).) Defendants' claims here arise out of the same series of transactions as Ps' complaint and Ds have demonstrated sufficient good cause for leave. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LIN WANG ET AL VS. ZHICHENG XUE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for, Friday, April 3, 2015, line 6. Defendant's Motion to Strike Portions of Complaint is GRANTED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND to address in good faith all issues raised in this Motion to Strike. Page 3, paragraph 10(c); page 3, paragraph 10(e); page 3, from paragraph 10(f) the following: "Wrongful Eviction; Assault; Battery; False Arrest & Imprisonment; Fraud; Negligent Misrepresentation; Intentional & Negligent Infliction of Emotional Distress; Declaratory Relief; Injunctive relief; Conspiracy; Violation of Civil rights; Abuse of Process; Malicious Prosecution; Trespas [sic] to Property, Defamation, Libel, Slander and Conversion"; page 3, paragraph 11(g); page 3, paragraph 14(a)(2); page 8, Exemplary Damages Attachment are stricken from the Complaint as they are not drawn or filed in conformity a court rule and are irrelevant, false, or improper. (Code Civ. Proc., Section 436.) = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DILIPKUMAR PATEL VS. ANN CAZAHOUS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant'S Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens, And For Attorney'S Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for, Friday, April 3, 2015, line 7. Defendant's Motion to Expunge the Lis Pendens is GRANTED. Plaintiff failed to properly serve and record the lis pendens. (See Code of Civil Procedure, Sections 405.20, 405.22.) Plaintiff has also not shown the probable validity of his real property claim. Defendant is awarded $3,335 in attorney fees and costs. = (501/REQ)
